title: LaneState
description: Serialized pipeline state passed between agent phases (Trajectory Reduction). Contains only the minimal structured state needed by the next phase — no natural-language conversation history.

task_source.description: Surface from which the task originated.

relevant_files.description: Paths of source files relevant to the task (populated by explore phase).

changed_files.description: Paths of files modified so far (populated by implement phase).

completed_steps.description: Human-readable labels of plan steps already completed.

next_action.description: One-sentence description of what the next phase should do first.

acceptance_criteria.description: Checklist items extracted from the issue or task description.

retry_count.description: Number of verify→implement retry cycles consumed so far.

error_fingerprints.description: Hashes of errors seen during verify. If the same fingerprint appears twice, the circuit breaker fires.

plan_steps.description: Structured plan steps (populated by plan phase, consumed by implement phase).
